title: Purple 16x
description: Purple PvP Texture Pack designed to give you a competitive edge.
body:
Purple 16x is a vibrant, purple-themed 16x resolution PvP texture pack designed for Minecraft, optimized for UHC, PotPvP, and competitive modes like bedwars. It features custom purple recolors for weapons, armor, and items to enhance visibility and style during intense fights, while providing an FPS boost for smoother gameplay on lower-end systems.
